allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; "=== node ==="; node --version; "=== npm ==="; npm --version; "=== claude existente? ==="; \(Get-Command claude\).Source; "=== winget ==="; \(Get-Command winget\).Source)
PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; "=== versão ==="; claude --version; "=== local do binário ==="; \(Get-Command claude\).Source)

PowerShell($src = "Atividade-2VA-20261-v2.docx"; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\docx_extract"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dest }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\(\(Resolve-Path $src\), $dest\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse $dest | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File apps\\backend\\src | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\apps\\backend\\src\\',''\)}} | Sort-Object Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File apps\\frontend\\src | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\apps\\frontend\\src\\',''\)}} | Sort-Object Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Guilherme\\Downloads\\projeto-apicultura-nest-main\\projeto-apicultura-nest-main\\apps\\frontend"; Write-Output "===== package.json scripts ====="; \(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts; Write-Output "===== Angular deps ====="; $p = Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json; $p.dependencies.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'angular' } | Select-Object Name, Value)
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:4200' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type')

PowerShell($ports = @\(3000,4200\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "Port $p still LISTENING \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)"; } else { Write-Output "Port $p free" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Guilherme\\Downloads\\projeto-apicultura-nest-main\\projeto-apicultura-nest-main\\apps\\backend"; Remove-Item -Force apicultura.sqlite -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force simulated_emails.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $p3 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $p4 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4200 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("Port 3000: " + $\(if \($p3\) {"in use"} else {"free"}\)\); Write-Output \("Port 4200: " + $\(if \($p4\) {"in use"} else {"free"}\)\); Write-Output \("DB present: " + \(Test-Path apicultura.sqlite\)\))

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Guilherme\\Downloads\\projeto-apicultura-nest-main\\projeto-apicultura-nest-main\\apps\\backend"; Remove-Item -Force apicultura.sqlite, simulated_emails.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("DB present: " + \(Test-Path apicultura.sqlite\)\))
